nasb.text: Then the men rose up from there, and looked down toward Sodom; and Abraham was walking with them to send them off.

esv.text: Then the men set out from there, and they looked down toward Sodom. And Abraham went with them to set them on their way.

cnv.text: 三人就從那裡起身，向著所多瑪觀望。亞伯拉罕與他們同行，要送他們一程。

ccb.text: 那三个人就起身朝所多玛眺望，亚伯拉罕与他们同行，要送他们一程。

csbs.text: 后来那些人从那里起身，去俯瞰所多玛。亚伯拉罕与他们同行，要为他们送行。
